document_summary.executive_summary: ExpenseTrack is a mobile app for small business owners to photograph receipts, auto-extract data, categorise expenses, and generate reports.

content.execution_summary:
• Generated vision document for ExpenseTrack
• 5 sections, 5 feature areas, 7 MVP features, 4 risks, 3 open questions
• Grounded in kb-L2-fintech-domain (82% coverage)
• Reflection: fixed 1 vague metric, added missing offline-sync constraint
• Uploaded to /exec-aaa-111/vision-doc/vision-expensetrack.md
• Knowledge bases consulted: kb-L2-fintech-domain (user roles, regulations), kb-L1-vision-document-template (structure)
• Guardrails evaluated: gr-L1-output-schema-validator (PASS), gr-L1-pii-detection (PASS), gr-L3-hallucination-detector (PASS)
• Tools invoked: tool-L1-azure-blob-upload (success — uploaded vision doc)

• Produced 8 FRs, 4 NFRs, 2 constraints, 3 assumptions, 2 gaps
• Key decisions: OCR extraction as Must-Have, offline-sync as Must-Have
• Reflection: re-classified 1 NFR from Should-Have to Must-Have (offline reliability)
• 2 gaps flagged for stakeholder input (authentication method, supported currencies)
• Knowledge bases consulted: kb-L1-enterprise-architecture (technology constraints)
• Guardrails evaluated: gr-L1-output-schema-validator (PASS), gr-L1-pii-detection (PASS), gr-L3-hallucination-detector (PASS), gr-L3-citation-validator (PASS)
• Tools invoked: none

• Generated 4 epics with 12 features across 3 sprints
• Sprint 1: Receipt Capture & OCR (foundation), Sprint 2: Categorisation + Budgets, Sprint 3: Reporting
• 100% requirements coverage (8/8 FRs mapped)
• Reflection: moved 1 feature from Sprint 3 to Sprint 2 for dependency resolution
• Knowledge bases consulted: kb-L1-ntuc-enterprise-architecture (EA constraints), kb-L1-epics-best-practices (decomposition patterns)
• Guardrails evaluated: gr-L1-output-schema-validator (PASS), gr-L3-hallucination-detector (PASS), gr-L3-consistency-checker (PASS)
• Tools invoked: none
